spec_match.rationale: Demo invokes the relevant API surface (WebGPU 'core-features-and-limits') and surfaces the result in the page, demonstrating the spec behaviour the feature ships.

interactive.rationale: Adapter mode, device feature request, and live feature/limit output controls now drive the WebGPU adapter and device APIs directly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: The page visibly handles no WebGPU, no adapter, request failure, compatibility hints, and devices without core-features-and-limits.

references.rationale: Page cites the required chromestatus.com/feature/4744775089258496 self-heal link (CLAUDE.md rule 3).

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: Core Features List now goes beyond a probe by letting visitors request core-features-and-limits on a device and inspect the live adapter/device split.
